item.superheroes.homelander_suit.lore.li: "There is no one stronger than me."
item.superheroes.milk_bottle.lore.line1: A glass baby-bottle of pure white liquid.
ability.superheroes.iron_fists.desc: Hardened fists — capped melee, heavy knockback, drags hostiles in
ability.superheroes.hand_clap.desc: Forward thunderclap — cone shockwave with massive knockback
ability.superheroes.stunning_roar.desc: Sonic roar — AoE damage and disorienting screen wave
ability.superheroes.flight.desc: Full inertial flight with strafe control
ability.superheroes.x_ray.desc: Highlights every living thing through walls
message.superheroes.armor_locked: The hero suit blocks regular armor.
commands.superheroes.not_a_player: Command must be run by a player
commands.superheroes.no_hero: You are not transformed into a hero
commands.superheroes.hero.failed: Failed to transform into %s (already this hero?)
item.superheroes.uranium_isotope.lore.li: Mined on a planet under FICSIT protectorate.
Ordinary uranium does nothing to superheroes — this isotope is the only thing that weakens them.
item.superheroes.uranium_isotope.lore.of: Hold in offhand for knockback resistance.
item.superheroes.uranium_isotope.lore.ra: Warning: 25 seconds of contact triggers Wither + Hunger.
item.superheroes.uranium_dagger.lore.lin: Forged from a single Uranium-238 isotope.
The radiant edge cuts through hero physiology like nothing else.
item.superheroes.uranium_dagger.lore.usa: Deals +10 damage to transformed heroes and drains their power.
item.superheroes.regulus_suit.lore.line1: The mantle of the Lion King — a divine protection that bends the world to his will.
item.superheroes.regulus_suit.lore.usage: Right-click to assume the form of Regulus Corneas.
ability.superheroes.lion_heart.desc: Greed of the world — invulnerable while active
ability.superheroes.mania_of_greed.desc: Pull a target and freeze time — damage delayed
ability.superheroes.greeds_embrace.desc: Mark a point — every living thing within 20 blocks is dragged in, struck for 35 damage and flung up. A 5-second light-cage seals them inside.
ability.superheroes.lion_roar.desc: Sonic blast that knocks back foes
item.superheroes.evangelion.lore.line2: The forbidden book of the Sin Archbishop of Greed
item.superheroes.evangelion.lore.warning: Opens Madness. There is no going back.
item.superheroes.evangelion.not_regulus: The book is silent for you.
ability.superheroes.counter_strike.desc: Lift the attacker, appear behind them and slam them into the ground
superheroes.madness.voice.1: The whole world belongs to me.
superheroes.madness.voice.3: Not a speck of dust moves without my consent.
superheroes.madness.voice.4: The law of the world is on my side.
superheroes.madness.voice.5: I am the archbishop of Greed.
superheroes.madness.voice.6: Your life already belongs to me.
superheroes.madness.voice.7: You dared raise your hand against me?
superheroes.madness.voice.11: You are dust beneath my boots.
superheroes.madness.voice.12: The Lion's Heart knows no mercy.
superheroes.madness.voice.13: The world bends around my will.
superheroes.madness.voice.14: Regulus Corneas is the only truth.
superheroes.madness.voice.15: I will kill you two hundred times if I must.
superheroes.madness.voice.16: Do not move. That is my right.
superheroes.madness.voice.17: A sin? No. This is justice.
superheroes.madness.voice.18: Every breath you take is my gift.
item.superheroes.vought_signal.lore.usag: ▶ Right-click on a block — summons Infected Homelander
item.superheroes.shadow_monarchs_cloak.l: A cloak woven from darkness itself — emblem of the Shadow Monarch.
hero.superheroes.sung_jinwoo.passive.2: Shadow Shield (all damage diverted to shadows)
ability.superheroes.arise.desc: Raise a Shadow Soldier from the body of a foe
ability.superheroes.shadow_exchange.desc: Swap places with the nearest shadow + 0.5s i-frames
ability.superheroes.sacrifice.desc: All shadows explode, dealing damage in 4-block radius
ability.superheroes.rulers_authority.des: Hurl the target into the air with damage and stun
ability.superheroes.monarchs_domain.desc: Ultimate: for 10s spectral blades strike enemies in 25-block radius
item.superheroes.doomsday_genome.lore.li: "It cannot be killed twice the same way."
DC Comics — The Reign of the Supermen
hero.superheroes.doomsday.passive.1: Massive frame: x2.2 scale, +80 HP, +30 Armor, +25% speed, Resistance I, KB-immune
hero.superheroes.doomsday.passive.2: Adaptation: each damage type kills him only once, +1 dmg per adaptation
hero.superheroes.doomsday.passive.3: Regeneration I + immune to fall damage + landing shockwave
hero.superheroes.doomsday.passive.4: High jump + Super Jump (G) + heavy footstep loop + persists through death
hero.superheroes.doomsday.passive.5: Evolution: 7 tiers — each death grants more stats and a new ability, resets only on detransform
hero.superheroes.doomsday.kryptonite.dro: A kryptonite shard breaks loose from Doomsday!
hero.superheroes.doomsday.kryptonite.los: Adaptation %s shattered — kryptonite forbids it forever
hero.superheroes.thanos.stone_reward: Stone of %s falls into your gauntlet
item.superheroes.kryptonite_shard.lore.l: Falls only from Doomsday at Phase 4+ for unadapted damage you dealt.
3 shards auto-cleanse one of his adaptations and ban it forever.
ability.superheroes.doomsday_smash.desc: Slam the ground — radial shockwave with heavy damage
ability.superheroes.doomsday_roar.desc: AoE roar — knockback, Weakness II and Slowness II for 5s
ability.superheroes.doomsday_berserk.des: Toggle: +12 damage, +15% speed, -15 armor — drains energy
Hurl a bone shard — 30-block ranged spike, 18 damage on hit
ability.superheroes.doomsday_doom_grip.d: Lock target within 8 blocks — 6 hits × 18 damage over 3s, final slam-throw + Slowness III
hero.superheroes.doomsday.death.simple: %s died from %s — already at max evolution
item.superheroes.naruto_headband.lore.li: "I never go back on my word!"
item.superheroes.vibranium_shield.lore.l: Forged of pure vibranium — perfectly balanced.
ability.superheroes.goku_kamehameha.desc: Charged ki beam — 30 blocks. Damage scales ×(1 + 0.5 × ki stacks).
ability.superheroes.goku_instant_transmi: Blink to nearest living entity within 30 blocks; 8 damage on arrival.
ability.superheroes.goku_ki_charge.desc: Hold to channel ki stacks (max 3). Stacks empower the next ability. Stacks reset on damage.
ability.superheroes.goku_solar_flare.des: Blinding flash in a 20-block radius. Mobs get stronger blindness and confusion.
ability.superheroes.goku_spirit_bomb.des: Channel a huge ki sphere, then detonate it for 50 AoE damage.
ability.superheroes.goku_super_saiyan_au: Toggle aura: ×2 attack damage, ×1.3 speed, fire resistance and glow while energy lasts.
ability.superheroes.naruto_rasengan.desc: Charge a spinning chakra orb. Next melee strike deals 35 damage with AoE knockback.
ability.superheroes.naruto_shadow_clones: Summon 2 decoy clones for 6s. Hostile mobs retarget to clones.
ability.superheroes.naruto_rasenshuriken: Charge and throw a wind chakra disk that slices enemies in AoE and applies bleed.
ability.superheroes.naruto_sage_mode.des: Toggle mode: higher damage, speed, max health and regeneration; drains energy over time.
ability.superheroes.naruto_oodama_raseng: Sage Art: Super Big Ball Rasengan. Charge 2.5s, then deliver a massive 50-damage strike with 6-block AoE and heavy knockback.
ability.superheroes.naruto_kawarimi.desc: Passive: on lethal damage, teleport behind attacker, debuff them, restore to 30% HP. 60s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.cap_shield_throw.des: Throws the vibranium shield — bounces between up to 3 targets, 14 damage each, then returns.
ability.superheroes.cap_shield_slam.desc: Leap and slam the ground — 5-block AoE, knockback, 5 damage.
ability.superheroes.cap_shield_dash.desc: Charge forward 8 blocks, slam the first enemy on path: 12 damage, knockback, Slowness II for 3s. 10s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.cap_counter_stance.d: Toggle defensive stance: Resistance II, Strength I, Speed I. Drains energy continuously.
Toggle Hulkbuster armor: +25 armor, +10 toughness, +6 attack, +20 max HP, +20% size, Resistance II — but slightly slower. High energy drain.
death.attack.homelander_eye_laser: %1$s was vaporised by Homelander's eye lasers
death.attack.homelander_heat_vision: %1$s was burned through by Homelander's heat vision
death.attack.homelander_heat_vision.play: %1$s was burned through by %2$s's heat vision
death.attack.homelander_hand_clap: %1$s was concussed by Homelander's thunder clap
death.attack.homelander_sonic_slam: %1$s was flattened by Homelander's sonic slam
death.attack.homelander_roar_boss: %1$s was deafened and broken by Homelander's roar
death.attack.homelander_roar_boss.player: %1$s was deafened and broken by %2$s's roar
hero.superheroes.goku.passive.3: Ki Body: immune to fall damage
hero.superheroes.captain_america.passive: Trained Landing: immune to fall damage
hero.superheroes.kratos.passive.1: Spartan Frame: +30 HP, +18 armor, +6 toughness, +10 attack
hero.superheroes.kratos.passive.2: God of War: knockback-immune, +1.5 reach, +1.0 step-up
hero.superheroes.kratos.passive.3: Iron Skin: permanent Resistance I, immune to fall damage
hero.superheroes.kratos.passive.4: Heavy Strikes: +1.0 attack speed, brutal melee
hero.superheroes.kratos.passive.rage: Spartan Rage: builds from damage taken & dealt. At 100% — God Slayer for 12 seconds.
hero.superheroes.loki.passive.2: Asgardian Grace: +25% speed, +0.4 jump, immune to fall damage
hero.superheroes.loki.passive.3: Silver-tongue: ×2 attack speed, high KB resistance
item.superheroes.blade_of_chaos.lore.lin: Chained twin blades forged in the fires of Hades
item.superheroes.loki_scepter.lore.line2: Chitauri sceptre containing the Mind Stone
Toggle: at full Rage gauge — God Slayer for 12s (+12 atk, ×2.5, Strength III, Resistance III, Speed II, Regen, +4 Absorption, KB-immune).
ability.superheroes.kratos_blade_storm.d: Leap-slam — 6-block AoE, up to 25 damage, sets enemies on fire for 4s.
ability.superheroes.kratos_chain_whirl.d: Toggle: spinning burning blades, 9 dmg + Weakness in 4b radius every 5 ticks. Drains 2 energy/tick.
ability.superheroes.kratos_leviathan_thr: Hurl the Leviathan Axe — 32-block hitscan, 30 damage, applies Slowness IV.
ability.superheroes.kratos_god_slayer.de: Ult: teleport to target and unleash 5 strikes, the last one a 4-block AoE.
ability.superheroes.loki_astral_clones.d: Mobs in 28b lose target; players in 20b take 12 dmg + Blindness/Confusion/Weakness; Loki gets Invis/Speed II/Resist I for 25s.
ability.superheroes.loki_tesseract_blink: Teleport behind your target: backstab for 40 dmg + Weakness II/Slowness III. Free blink up to 60b.
ability.superheroes.loki_mind_charm.desc: 24b beam: players — Slowness III + Weakness II + Mining Fatigue III + Blindness/Confusion/Glowing for 8s.
ability.superheroes.loki_glamour.desc: Toggle: Invisibility + Speed III + Strength III + Haste II. Perfect backstab setup.
ability.superheroes.loki_chaos_bolt.desc: 32b hitscan: 28 dmg primary + 18 splash 5b. Random effect + Weakness/Confusion/Levitation.
ability.superheroes.naruto_bijuudama.des: Tailed Beast Bomb — 32-block hitscan with a 7-block sphere: 40 damage at the centre, 16 at the edge, sets the area on fire for 6s.
death.attack.kratos_blade: %1$s was butchered by %2$s's Blades of Chaos
death.attack.kratos_blade.player: %1$s was butchered by %2$s's Blades of Chaos
hero.superheroes.thanos.passive.1: Titan Frame: +30 HP, +20 armor, +8 toughness, +10 attack
hero.superheroes.thanos.passive.2: Cosmic Resilience: knockback-immune, permanent Resistance II + Fire Resistance
hero.superheroes.thanos.passive.3: Imposing Stature: +25% scale, +1.0 reach, +1.0 step, immune to fall damage
hero.superheroes.thanos.passive.4: Stone Bearer: each Infinity Stone in the Gauntlet grants its bonus while equipped
item.superheroes.infinity_gauntlet.desc: Forged on Nidavellir to wield all six Infinity Stones.
item.superheroes.infinity_gauntlet.full: All six are gathered. The Snap is now in your reach.
item.superheroes.infinity_gauntlet.usage: ▶ Right-click with a stone in the other hand — Insert it
▶ Shift + Right-click — Eject the last inserted stone
item.superheroes.infinity_stone.usage: ▶ Right-click on Infinity Gauntlet to insert
item.superheroes.power_stone.desc: Pulses with cosmic violence — purple as a god's grief.
item.superheroes.space_stone.desc: Folds the void into a single blue glint.
item.superheroes.reality_stone.desc: A red ember that rewrites what is and what was.
item.superheroes.soul_stone.desc: Demands a sacrifice — pays back tenfold in vitality.
item.superheroes.time_stone.desc: The Eye of Agamotto — every second is yours to spend twice.
item.superheroes.mind_stone.desc: A cold yellow intelligence; no force can move you against it.
ability.superheroes.thanos_cosmic_slam.d: A massive purple beam of Power from the Gauntlet, 64 blocks long — pierces every enemy in its path, up to 55 damage in the core, knocks back.
Tear a rift in reality — pulls every hostile within 14 blocks toward a singular point, dealing 16 damage and stunning them with Levitation + Weakness.
ability.superheroes.thanos.gate_failed: This ability requires the %s in the Gauntlet.
ability.superheroes.thanos_mind_pulse.de: 32-block hitscan beam: 18 damage and Confusion, Weakness II, Slowness III for 8s.
ability.superheroes.thanos_time_rewind.d: Rewind your timeline — full heal, cleanse all effects, then Regen III + Absorption III + Resistance III.
Opens a portal beneath your target within 30 blocks (4-block grab radius around the crosshair) — yanks them right in front of you and blinds them for 1.5s. Catches fliers and kiters.
ability.superheroes.thanos_soul_pulse.de: Electric wave around you, 10-block radius: 8 damage, knocks enemies away, locks their abilities for 4s. Breaks tanks and regens.
ability.superheroes.thanos_snap.desc: Ult — requires all 6 Stones. All players within 128 blocks suffer ability lock + heal lock + Slow III + Nausea + 1HP dmg/sec for 30 seconds.
ability.superheroes.thanos_snap.gate_fai: The Snap demands all six Stones — only %s of %s seated.
ability.superheroes.thanos_snap.gauntlet: The Gauntlet collapses to dust along with the Stones.
ability.superheroes.thanos_snap.stones_c: The Stones are dust. The Gauntlet stands empty.
item.superheroes.reinhard_suit.lore.line: "I am but a sword in service of the future King."
item.superheroes.royal_icicle.lore.line1: The Dragon Sword. Its true edge cuts only the worthy.
item.superheroes.royal_icicle.lore.worth: ▶ Damages only worthy opponents (players/bosses); ignores common mobs
Toggle. Summons Reid and grants +6 damage, +50% speed, +0.4 jump, +1 attack-speed. Sword swings cleave a 5-block radius.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_air_slash.d: Cuts the air with a spirit wave 9 blocks ahead. 14 damage to worthy opponents + heavy knockback. 8 damage to regular mobs. 1.5s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_judgment_ma: Marks the target for 30 seconds. The marked target glows through walls and takes bonus damage from your weapon. 10s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_wish.desc: Once per 30 seconds, gain immunity to the most recent damage type. 3 wishes per life. After the 3rd — +30% incoming damage until you die.
Launches a 25-block crescent wave. 18 dmg to worthy, 9 to mobs. Pierces enemies. 3s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_counter_rip: Enters parry stance for 2 seconds — blocks ALL damage and reflects 200% back. 12s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_divine_aura: Toggle. Enemies within 7 blocks get Slowness II + Glowing + Weakness. You get Resistance II + Strength I. 80 energy/sec. Requires sword.
ability.superheroes.reinhard_speed_judgm: Finds a moving player within 50 blocks, blinks behind them, slows time, waits 3 seconds, then strikes for 50 damage. 8s cooldown.
No moving players or debug-eligible mobs nearby.
ability.superheroes.reinhard.second_comi: Second Coming is spent — the next death will be real
Second Coming has already been used this life
screen.superheroes.reinhard_wish.title: Make a Wish
screen.superheroes.reinhard_wish.subtitl: Used %s of %s. Pick a damage source for immunity:
hero.superheroes.reinhard.passive.2: Damage adaptation — repeated damage type quickly stops affecting Reinhard
hero.superheroes.reinhard.passive.3: Phases 1–5 — attack/armor/HP/speed grow with damage dealt
hero.superheroes.reinhard.passive.4: Dragon Sword Reid — 5s ceremony, time slows down on first strike that lands
hero.superheroes.reinhard.passive.5: Second Coming — once per life Reinhard rises with all positive effects and +1000 sword damage
hero.superheroes.reinhard.passive.6: Divine reflexes — reflects projectiles/beams and dodges the first ordinary attack each life
Sword locked — endure %s damage from a single foe
Worthy! The sword is ready to be drawn
hud.superheroes.reinhard.death_mark.subt: Time stops — the strike has already landed
item.superheroes.raiden_suit.lore.line1: "Eternity is engraved upon a single thunderclap."
item.superheroes.musou_no_hitotachi.lore: Yamato, dyed in the Archon's electro
▶ While Eye of Stormy Judgment is active — every strike triggers a thunder hit + AoE
▶ During Musou Shinsetsu — strikes deal +50% with electro AoE
ability.superheroes.raiden_eye_of_judgme: Toggle. For 25 seconds every Yamato strike triggers a Glaive of Judgment thunder hit (+9 damage to players, +4 to mobs) plus a 3-block electro splash. Costs 50 energy on activation.
Yamato is not in your hands
ability.superheroes.raiden_musou_shinset: Burst (active). For 7 seconds: +6 attack damage, +50% movement speed, +1.5 attack speed. Every Yamato strike deals +50% with a 4-block AoE. Final slash detonates an 8-block electro AoE (22 damage to players, 12 to mobs). 25-second cooldown. Costs 500 energy.
Yamato is not in your hands
ability.superheroes.raiden_sword_draw.de: Toggle. Summons or dismisses Musou no Hitotachi (Yamato) into your hand. The blade is required for Eye of Stormy Judgment and Musou Shinsetsu.
ability.superheroes.raiden_plunging_stri: 4-second windup — Musou forms above and falls with thunder. 5×8 crater, 60 damage at epicenter, screen-shake within 100 blocks. 18s cooldown, 280 energy.
Yamato is not in your hands
ability.superheroes.raiden_transcendence: Toggle. Engulf yourself in an electro aura; every 1.5 seconds zaps the closest enemy within 6 blocks (4 damage to players, 2 to mobs). Drains 12 energy per second.
Active. 3-second windup that freezes enemies within 50 blocks, then cleaves a 45-block electro trench with lightning, heavy screen-shake, and stronger damage. 45-second cooldown. Costs 800 energy.
Yamato is not in your hands
ability.superheroes.viltrumite_charge.de: Lightning-fast 22-block dash (about 55 while flying): smashes through enemies for 28 damage with heavy knockback and shatters ground and walls on contact. 8s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.meteor_slam.desc: Launch or dive into a ground-shaking impact. Airborne slams hit harder and wider. 11s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.shockwave_pulse.desc: Release a close-range radial shockwave around you for damage, knockback and screen shake. 6s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.guardians_breaker.de: Rocket to the nearest target within 20 blocks, smash through the flight path, and leave a compact crater at the impact point, sweeping nearby enemies away. 8s cooldown.
hero.superheroes.invincible.passive.1: Viltrumite Durability: +40 HP, +26 armor, +12 toughness, permanent Resistance I
hero.superheroes.invincible.passive.2: Super Strength: +12 attack damage, +0.6 attack speed, full knockback resistance, lighter Iron Fists impacts on melee
hero.superheroes.invincible.passive.3: Aerial Combat: inertial flight, no fall damage, landing shockwaves
hero.superheroes.invincible.passive.4: Fast Recovery: permanent Regeneration I and Fire Resistance
ability.superheroes.omniman_viltrumite_r: Launch forward in a lightning-fast controlled rush that shatters ground and walls on contact. In flight, the rush is 2.5x faster; Merciless Momentum extends it and launches victims harder. 7s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.omniman_world_breake: A short-range execution punch or frontal shockwave. Merciless Momentum amplifies the impact. 7.5s cooldown.
hero.superheroes.omniman.passive.1: S-tier Viltrumite Frame: +60 HP, +30 armor, +16 toughness, +16 attack, full knockback resistance
hero.superheroes.omniman.passive.2: Merciless Momentum: speed and flight build hidden momentum that empowers melee, Rush and World Breaker
hero.superheroes.omniman.passive.3: War Flight: inertial flight, no fall damage, devastating landing shockwaves
hero.superheroes.omniman.passive.4: Old Soldier Recovery: permanent Regeneration II, Resistance II and Fire Resistance
item.superheroes.kazuha_vision.lore.line: A maple-scented breeze rests inside the Vision.
hero.superheroes.kazuha.passive.1: Anemo Footwork: high speed, jump strength and safe fall distance
hero.superheroes.kazuha.passive.2: Wandering Samurai: boosted melee reach, attack speed and moderate armor
hero.superheroes.kazuha.passive.3: Poetic Guard: full fall damage immunity
ability.superheroes.kazuha_chihayaburu.d: Leap upward and pull nearby enemies into an anemo gust. Deals light damage, levitates and slows. 8s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.kazuha_midare_ranzan: Plunging slash. Stronger while airborne; damages and launches enemies around the impact. 11s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.kazuha_autumn_whirlw: Toggle. Grants speed, jump and slow falling while stirring nearby enemies with weak anemo pressure. Drains energy.
ability.superheroes.kazuha_maple_storm.d: Ultimate gust field: pulls enemies inward, slows, weakens and lifts them while Kazuha gains brief protection. 28s cooldown.
item.superheroes.scaramouche_vision.lore: A cold wind circles a shard of stolen divinity.
hero.superheroes.scaramouche.passive.1: Windborne Body: slow falling, jump boost and safe fall distance
hero.superheroes.scaramouche.passive.2: Puppet Frame: extra health, speed, attack speed and light armor
hero.superheroes.scaramouche.passive.3: Hover Combat: can use normal flight plus wind mobility skills
ability.superheroes.scaramouche_windstep: Launch forward and upward in a burst of anemo, damaging and lifting nearby enemies. 5s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.scaramouche_electro_: Wide forward anemo-electro cone. Damages, slows, weakens and marks enemies. 7s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.scaramouche_wind_pri: Toggle zone. Creates a wind cage at range, pulling enemies inward and shocking them over time. Drains energy.
ability.superheroes.scaramouche_skyfall_: Long-range anemo-electro blast that detonates at the target point for heavy AoE damage and levitation. 22s cooldown.
A trophy taken only by those who live for a worthy fight.
hero.superheroes.battle_beast.passive.1: Battle Curse: starts around A-tier and grows every 30 seconds into S-tier and beyond
hero.superheroes.battle_beast.passive.2: Warborn Frame: +35% size, armor, toughness, reach, knockback immunity and stronger landing shockwaves
hero.superheroes.battle_beast.passive.3: Blood for Battle: curse stages amplify all ability damage with louder VFX/SFX
ability.superheroes.battle_beast_predato: Leap into prey, damaging, slowing and launching enemies in your path. 8s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.battle_beast_axe_cle: Brutal forward cone slash with higher damage up close and Weakness on hit. 6s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.battle_beast_war_roa: Radial roar that damages, pushes back, weakens and slows nearby enemies. 10s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.battle_beast_bloodlu: Heal and gain Strength, Regeneration and Resistance for a short violent window. 16s cooldown.
item.superheroes.rem_oni_horn.lore.line1: A blue-haired oni maid answers with steel and devotion.
item.superheroes.rem_morning_star.lore.l: A chained oni mace that opens wounds in demonism.
Granted while Rem's horn is active.
hero.superheroes.rem.passive.1: A-tier Oni Maid: strong base armor, melee speed, healing magic and ice control
hero.superheroes.rem.passive.2: Demonism: charges from combat; manual activation lasts 25s at full charge
hero.superheroes.rem.passive.3: Oni Death-Save: lethal damage triggers permanent S-tier demonism until the next real death
ability.superheroes.rem_morning_star.des: Demonism only. Throw the morning star to damage, slow, pull and inflict Bleeding for 10s. 8s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.rem_oni_rage.desc: Toggle at full charge for 25s. Grants S-tier stats, neon horn and morning star. Fatal damage activates it permanently.
ability.superheroes.rem_healing_magic.de: Cleanse fire, heal and gain Regeneration plus Absorption. 14s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.rem_ice_burst.desc: Base-form ice slash that damages, weakens and slows enemies in a short cone. 7s cooldown.
Demonism only. Ground ice spikes rise forward in a wide wave, damaging and heavily slowing enemies. 9s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.rem_mace_crater.desc: Demonism only. Animated 1.5s mace windup, then smash 10 blocks ahead and carve a 5x5 crater. 14s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.rem_oni_kick.desc: Demonism only. Burst forward with a brutal kick, damaging and launching enemies in your path. 5s cooldown.
item.superheroes.a_train_suit.lore.line1: Vought speed woven into a track suit.
hero.superheroes.a_train.passive.1: Compound-V Speedster: extreme movement and attack speed
hero.superheroes.a_train.passive.2: Runner Build: light armor, extra health, jump and safe fall distance
hero.superheroes.a_train.passive.3: No Flight: strongest on the ground, punished by control and bad angles
ability.superheroes.a_train_mach_dash.de: Explode forward in a long sprint, damaging and disorienting enemies along the line. 6s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.a_train_sonic_boom.d: Forward pressure wave that damages, confuses, weakens and knocks enemies back. 9s cooldown.
ability.superheroes.a_train_hyperspeed.d: Toggle. Massive speed, haste and brief resistance while electricity trails behind you. Drains energy.
ability.superheroes.a_train_adrenaline_r: Break slows, heal and gain Regeneration, Absorption and Speed. 12s cooldown.
hud.superheroes.edit.title: HUD Editor
hud.superheroes.edit.hint: Drag the cards to move HUD elements. Positions are saved automatically.
hud.superheroes.jarvis.detect.title: JARVIS // TARGET DETECTED
